results.compiled_code:
with all_values as (

    select
        event_scope_type as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "analytics"."analytics_analytics_marts"."dim_event"
    group by event_scope_type

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'global','mixed','multi_chokepoint','chokepoint_specific','regional','unscoped'
)

with all_values as (

    select
        severity_level as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "analytics"."analytics_analytics_marts"."dim_event"
    group by severity_level

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'low','medium','high','critical'
)

select *
from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."mart_reporter_month_chokepoint_exposure"
where chokepoint_trade_exposure_ratio < 0

-- Fails when hub fact duplicates rows at reporter-partner-partner2-commodity-month-flow grain.
with duplicate_grain as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    partner_iso3,
    coalesce(partner2_iso3, '__NULL__') as partner2_iso3_key,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    trade_flow,
    count(*) as row_count
  from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."fct_reporter_partner_commodity_hub_month"
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
  having count(*) > 1
)

select *
from duplicate_grain

-- Fails when canonical trade fact has duplicate rows at its declared grain.
with duplicate_grain as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    partner_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    trade_flow,
    count(*) as row_count
  from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."fct_reporter_partner_commodity_month"
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
  having count(*) > 1
)

select *
from duplicate_grain

-- Fails when route-enriched fact duplicates canonical grain rows.
with duplicate_grain as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    partner_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    trade_flow,
    count(*) as row_count
  from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."fct_reporter_partner_commodity_route_month"
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
  having count(*) > 1
)

select *
from duplicate_grain

-- Fails when non-null hub ISO3 values do not resolve to the country dimension.
select
  h.hub_iso3,
  count(*) as row_count
from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."fct_reporter_partner_commodity_hub_month" as h
left join "analytics"."analytics_staging"."stg_dim_country" as c
  on h.hub_iso3 = c.iso3
where h.hub_iso3 is not null
  and c.iso3 is null
group by 1

-- Fails when hub dependency mart has duplicate rows at its declared grain.
with duplicate_grain as (
  select
    hub_iso3,
    period,
    year_month,
    route_confidence_score,
    count(*) as row_count
  from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."mart_hub_dependency_month"
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4
  having count(*) > 1
)

select *
from duplicate_grain

-- Fails when route-fact hub boolean disagrees with existence of hub rows for same canonical keys.
with hub_presence as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    partner_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    trade_flow,
    bool_or(has_partner2_hub) as expected_has_hub
  from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."fct_reporter_partner_commodity_hub_month"
  group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
),
route_rows as (
  select
    reporter_iso3,
    partner_iso3,
    cmd_code,
    period,
    year_month,
    trade_flow,
    has_associated_hub_route
  from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."fct_reporter_partner_commodity_route_month"
)

select
  rr.reporter_iso3,
  rr.partner_iso3,
  rr.cmd_code,
  rr.period,
  rr.year_month,
  rr.trade_flow,
  rr.has_associated_hub_route,
  coalesce(hp.expected_has_hub, false) as expected_has_hub
from route_rows as rr
left join hub_presence as hp
  on rr.reporter_iso3 = hp.reporter_iso3
 and rr.partner_iso3 = hp.partner_iso3
 and rr.cmd_code = hp.cmd_code
 and rr.period = hp.period
 and rr.year_month = hp.year_month
 and rr.trade_flow = hp.trade_flow
where rr.has_associated_hub_route <> coalesce(hp.expected_has_hub, false)

-- Fails when indicator_code is outside the current supported set.

select
  indicator_code
from "analytics"."analytics_staging"."stg_energy_vulnerability"
where indicator_code not in (
  'renewables_share',
  'fossil_fuels_share',
  'dependency_on_imported_energy',
  'oil_electricity_share',
  'gas_electricity_share',
  'coal_electricity_share'
)

-- Fails when synthetic annual compatibility period is missing.

select
  reporter_iso3,
  period,
  indicator_code
from "analytics"."analytics_staging"."stg_energy_vulnerability"
where period is null

-- Fails when reporter_iso3 + year + indicator_code is not unique.

select
  reporter_iso3,
  period,
  indicator_code,
  count(*) as row_count
from "analytics"."analytics_staging"."stg_energy_vulnerability"
group by 1, 2, 3
having count(*) > 1

select
    event_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "analytics"."analytics_analytics_marts"."dim_event"
where event_id is not null
group by event_id
having count(*) > 1

select
    location_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "analytics"."analytics_analytics_marts"."dim_location"
where location_id is not null
group by location_id
having count(*) > 1

select
    canonical_grain_key as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."fct_reporter_partner_commodity_month_provenance"
where canonical_grain_key is not null
group by canonical_grain_key
having count(*) > 1

select
    event_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "analytics"."analytics_marts"."mart_event_impact"
where event_id is not null
group by event_id
having count(*) > 1

select
    period as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "analytics"."analytics_staging"."stg_dim_time"
where period is not null
group by period
having count(*) > 1

select
    year_month as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "analytics"."analytics_staging"."stg_dim_time"
where year_month is not null
group by year_month
having count(*) > 1

select
    event_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "analytics"."analytics_analytics_staging"."stg_event_raw"
where event_id is not null
group by event_id
having count(*) > 1
